text:
oss-4.2.b2002
solution bad locate bin
soundoff ctrl + alt + del :\
command not found ossinfo in boot :\

SOLUTION!
mv /usr/local/sbin/ossdevlinks /usr/sbin/
/usr/local/bin/ossinfo /usr/bin

2009/10/15 <gavin@freebsd.org>

> Old Synopsis: oss overflow
> New Synopsis: audio/oss - "overflow" messages
